title: Soul Classes
description: the 4 classes you can play as
body:
Soul classes add 4 playable classes, such as:

1)Mage
![mage preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c1c26e7fc4c38e280bf267300f728e764e0a012.png)
2)Fighter
![fighter preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/881fa2276ff426c0ea870fa5b4ede9cd6f77237b.png)
3)Knight
![Knight preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/033d73a46b360f6195de42de269483a1aa0c54a1.png)
4)Priest
![priest preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e8692c67522aad8093767458f4d27d95185d01a.png)

To play as them, you need to just hold the soul item and you will transform into class.
They all have diferent attacks on a ground or in a mid-air.
